title: Sculk Powers
description: This mod adds Sculk themed powers via Palladium, made for the Landfall SMP.
body:
This mod is a bundled addonpack for ThreeTAG's Palladium mod. It adds two abilities:

**Active:** when toggled on, you can vibrate through certain blocks that sculk replaces. You also don't activate Sculk sensors.

**Passive:** when active is toggled off, you can move faster and jump higher.

It is designed for the [Landfall-241: The Sculk Horde](https://modrinth.com/modpack/landfall-241-the-sculk-horde) modpack.
